strengths: 15+ years of professional experience far exceeds 6+ year requirement, with multiple senior/staff-level positions confirming deep capability
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly matching explicit requirement for AI agent development experience
Full-stack mastery across backend (Node.js, TypeScript, Java), frontend (React, Ember.js), infrastructure (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes), and databases
concerns: Resume authenticity flag: name listed as 'Aisha Okonkwo' but all contact details (email, GitHub, LinkedIn, website) reference 'szabobogdan'; requires verification
Primary stack framework Nest.js not explicitly mentioned, though extensive Node.js/TypeScript background indicates quick learning curve
Testing framework specifics (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) and PostgreSQL experience not explicitly detailed despite demonstrated testing/TDD focus
response.justification: Candidate brings exceptional depth with 15+ years of professional experience and active work on AI-agent infrastructure—a rare, explicitly required skill. Full-stack capabilities across primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) are well-demonstrated through multiple senior roles. However, the resume name/contact discrepancy (Aisha Okonkwo vs. szabobogdan) requires verification before proceeding. Technology gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and PostgreSQL are notable but likely manageable given strong TypeScript and Node.js fundamentals. Recommend interview to investigate resume authenticity and assess framework-specific knowledge.
